items.headline: Uber ordered to pay $8.5 million in trial over driver sex assault claims

summaryParagraphs: The case was the first trial – known as a 'bellwether' – of more than 3,000 similar lawsuits against Uber that have been consolidated in U.S. federal court. Bellwether trials are used to test legal theories and help gauge the value of claims for possible settlements. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Livemint.

items.headline: Reddit forecasts strong revenue as AI tools drive ad sales

summaryParagraphs: Q4 revenue rose 70% to $726 million, beating estimates of $665.4 million. Its earnings per share of $1.24 also exceeded estimates of 94 cents. Daily active unique visitors rose 19%, to 121.4 million in the quarter ended December 31, while its global average revenue per user increased by 42%.
